title: Project VS Board
excerpt: Hello! HELP!  I have set up my clients as individual projects - not boards. should i set them up individually as boards instead? I’m struggling to see the difference between projects and boards!?

posts.author: Cree (Cree Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! HELP! I have set up my clients as individual projects - not boards. should i set them up individually as boards instead? I’m struggling to see the difference between projects and boards!?

posts.author: Tuko (Luis Alberto Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml: You can use filters, Have them all in one board and create multiple filters and share them the tab.
